text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
(SQUEEE! She hasn't turned invisible at<n>all! That's
adorable beyond words!)

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Hehehe, Sei taught me this move<n>yesterday!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Hey, hey, can you see me? I'm right<n>here!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: I cannot see you at all!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Whoa, really?! Yippee! I did it!
